name: claude-limit-meter
description: Shows current Claude Code context pressure and 5h/weekly token usage in the VS Code status bar.

commands.title: Claude Limit Meter: Toggle Bar View
Claude Limit Meter: Open Usage Page (claude.ai)
Claude Limit Meter: Toggle Kick Auto-Handoff Hook
Claude Limit Meter: Reinstall Kick Hook (force overwrite)
Claude Limit Meter: Uninstall Kick Hook
Claude Limit Meter: Show Quota Limits

claudeLimitMeter.updateIntervalSeconds.description: How often to scan Claude Code session logs.

claudeLimitMeter.barLength.description: Number of characters in the status bar meter.

claudeLimitMeter.showBar.description: Show the compact colored bar in the status bar.

claudeLimitMeter.textColor.description: Status bar text color. Use a dark high-contrast color for bright status bars.

claudeLimitMeter.warnPercent.description: Context percentage where the meter switches to yellow.

claudeLimitMeter.highPercent.description: Context percentage where the meter switches to orange.

claudeLimitMeter.criticalPercent.description: Context percentage where the meter switches to red.

claudeLimitMeter.contextWindowOverride.description: Override model context window size in tokens. 0 = auto-detect from model name.

claudeLimitMeter.show5hUsage.description: Aggregate and show 5-hour rolling token usage block in tooltip.

claudeLimitMeter.showWeeklyUsage.description: Aggregate and show weekly token usage in tooltip.

claudeLimitMeter.scanWindowHours.description: How many hours of session history to scan for usage aggregation (default: 8 days).

claudeLimitMeter.statusBarPriority.description: Status bar item priority for cc-ctx. Higher value places the item further to the left in the right-aligned status bar cluster.

claudeLimitMeter.usagePageUrl.description: URL opened on click of the status bar item.

claudeLimitMeter.showKickStatus.description: Show separate status bar item for the /kick auto PostCompact hook (right of cc-ctx).
